prompt:
请执行一次 Phase 29 Windows Computer Use 只读窗口截图/UIA evidence 验收：只验证 get_window_state 会保存截图 artifact、metadata artifact、过滤 UIA 敏感文本，不要移动鼠标，不要点击真实桌面，最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_READY。 你必须调用终端工具执行这个只读命令验证协议：$env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from pathlib import Path; from learning_agent.computer_use.controller import ComputerUseController, WindowsComputerUseBackend; from learning_agent.computer_use.evidence import ComputerUseEvidenceStore; from learning_agent.computer_use.helper_client import StaticWindowObservationHelper, WindowObservationPayload; from learning_agent.computer_use.windows_backend import StaticWindowsWindowInventory; root=Path('memory/computer_use/evidence_phase29_acceptance'); inv=StaticWindowsWindowInventory(raw_windows=[{'hwnd':24680,'pid':100,'process_name':'notepad.exe','class_name':'Notepad','title':'Notepad Phase29','rect':{'left':10,'top':20,'right':310,'bottom':220}}], captured_at='2026-06-03T00:00:00Z'); payload=WindowObservationPayload(screenshot_bytes=b'phase29-visible-terminal-png', screenshot_format='png', screenshot_width=123, screenshot_height=45, accessibility_text='title safe text
password: hidden
button ok
'+('longtext '*200), focused_element='edit box', selected_text='safe selected text', document_text='safe document text', helper_name='static_phase29_helper', helper_available=True, helper_reason='acceptance helper'); helper=StaticWindowObservationHelper(payloads={'hwnd:24680':payload}); store=ComputerUseEvidenceStore(evidence_root=root); c=ComputerUseController(backend=WindowsComputerUseBackend(inventory=inv, real_actions_enabled=False, evidence_store=store, observation_helper=helper)); w=c.observe({'action':'list_windows'}); s=c.observe({'action':'get_window_state','window':w.data['windows'][0]}); state=s.data['state']; metadata=Path(state['evidence_path']); screenshot=Path(state['screenshot_path']); password_hidden='password' not in state['accessibility_excerpt'].lower(); assert s.ok and metadata.exists() and screenshot.exists() and state['screenshot_width']==123 and state['screenshot_height']==45 and password_hidden and state['accessibility_truncated']; print('PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_OK screenshot='+str(screenshot.exists()).lower()+' metadata='+str(metadata.exists()).lower()+' width='+str(state['screenshot_width'])+' filtered='+str(state['accessibility_filtered_line_count'])+' truncated='+str(state['accessibility_truncated']).lower()+' password_hidden='+str(password_hidden).lower())" 不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_READY PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_OK screenshot=true metadata=true width=123 filtered=1 truncated=true password_hidden=true

stages.name: interactive_turn
stages.prompt:
请执行一次 Phase 29 Windows Computer Use 只读窗口截图/UIA evidence 验收：只验证 get_window_state 会保存截图 artifact、metadata artifact、过滤 UIA 敏感文本，不要移动鼠标，不要点击真实桌面，最终回答必须包含固定标记：PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_READY。 你必须调用终端工具执行这个只读命令验证协议：$env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from pathlib import Path; from learning_agent.computer_use.controller import ComputerUseController, WindowsComputerUseBackend; from learning_agent.computer_use.evidence import ComputerUseEvidenceStore; from learning_agent.computer_use.helper_client import StaticWindowObservationHelper, WindowObservationPayload; from learning_agent.computer_use.windows_backend import StaticWindowsWindowInventory; root=Path('memory/computer_use/evidence_phase29_acceptance'); inv=StaticWindowsWindowInventory(raw_windows=[{'hwnd':24680,'pid':100,'process_name':'notepad.exe','class_name':'Notepad','title':'Notepad Phase29','rect':{'left':10,'top':20,'right':310,'bottom':220}}], captured_at='2026-06-03T00:00:00Z'); payload=WindowObservationPayload(screenshot_bytes=b'phase29-visible-terminal-png', screenshot_format='png', screenshot_width=123, screenshot_height=45, accessibility_text='title safe text
password: hidden
button ok
'+('longtext '*200), focused_element='edit box', selected_text='safe selected text', document_text='safe document text', helper_name='static_phase29_helper', helper_available=True, helper_reason='acceptance helper'); helper=StaticWindowObservationHelper(payloads={'hwnd:24680':payload}); store=ComputerUseEvidenceStore(evidence_root=root); c=ComputerUseController(backend=WindowsComputerUseBackend(inventory=inv, real_actions_enabled=False, evidence_store=store, observation_helper=helper)); w=c.observe({'action':'list_windows'}); s=c.observe({'action':'get_window_state','window':w.data['windows'][0]}); state=s.data['state']; metadata=Path(state['evidence_path']); screenshot=Path(state['screenshot_path']); password_hidden='password' not in state['accessibility_excerpt'].lower(); assert s.ok and metadata.exists() and screenshot.exists() and state['screenshot_width']==123 and state['screenshot_height']==45 and password_hidden and state['accessibility_truncated']; print('PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_OK screenshot='+str(screenshot.exists()).lower()+' metadata='+str(metadata.exists()).lower()+' width='+str(state['screenshot_width'])+' filtered='+str(state['accessibility_filtered_line_count'])+' truncated='+str(state['accessibility_truncated']).lower()+' password_hidden='+str(password_hidden).lower())" 不要提前最终回答；只有终端命令成功输出 PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_OK 后，最终回答最后一行必须完整复制：PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_READY PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_OK screenshot=true metadata=true width=123 filtered=1 truncated=true password_hidden=true
stages.checkpoint:
只读窗口截图/UIA evidence 验收已通过：已验证 get_window_state 保存截图 artifact、metadata artifact，并过滤 UIA 敏感文本；未移动鼠标，未点击真实桌面。

PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_READY PHASE29_WINDOWS_OBSERVE_OK screenshot=true metadata=true width=123 filtered=1 truncated=true password_hidden=true
